title: Japanese Algerian Pilaf
description: A comforting and aromatic Japanese-inspired pilaf dish infused with the warm flavors of Algerian cuisine. This dish is a perfect blend of East meets West.
instructions: Heat 2 cups of water in a medium saucepan over high heat.
Add 1 cup of rice and 1/2 cup of pilaf to the saucepan.
Bring the water to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Stir in 1 tsp of Algerian and 1 tsp of xeriscent.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
